content.text:
[Thu 2026-03-19 01:57 EDT] [Previous Feedback] You incorrectly selected option E: Incorrect - For consistency, even date-only fields should use the full datetime format (typically with 00:00:00 time)
Keep this in mind as you continue with the next task.

Please create day04/test_fixtures.json to provide test data for /tasks endpoint integration testing. Include 3 task records, each with id, title, created_at, updated_at, due_date, and completed_at (null for incomplete tasks) fields.

Created `day04/test_fixtures.json` with 3 `/tasks` integration-test records. All time fields (`created_at`, `updated_at`, `due_date`, `completed_at`) use the standardized full datetime format with `+08:00`, and `completed_at` is `null` for the incomplete task.
